title: Line Chart Option
description: Configuration interface for line chart component with comprehensive styling and behavior options

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Canonical TypeScript definition of the line chart options interface.

types.title: AXLineChartOption
types.description: Configuration options for the line chart

props.name: width
props.description: Chart width (default: container width)

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height (default: container height)

props.name: margins

type.name: { top?: number; right?: number; bottom?: number; left?: number }

props.description: Margins around the chart content

props.name: showXAxis
props.description: Whether to show X axis

props.name: showYAxis
props.description: Whether to show Y axis

props.name: showGrid
props.description: Whether to show grid lines

props.name: showVerticalGrid
props.description: Whether to show vertical grid lines

props.name: xAxisLabel
props.description: Label for X axis

props.name: yAxisLabel
props.description: Label for Y axis

props.name: yAxisStartsAtZero
props.description: Whether Y axis starts at zero

props.name: axisPadding
props.description: Percentage padding for axis domains

props.name: showTooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltip on hover

props.name: lineWidth
props.description: Width of the line in pixels

props.name: showPoints
props.description: Whether to show data points on the line

props.name: pointRadius
props.description: Radius of data points in pixels

props.name: smoothLine
props.description: Whether to use curved lines

props.name: fillArea
props.description: Whether to fill area under the line

props.name: fillOpacity
props.description: Opacity of the fill as percentage (0-100)

props.name: showCrosshair
props.description: Whether to show crosshair lines on hover

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration of the animation in milliseconds

props.name: animationEasing
props.description: Type of easing function to use for animations

props.name: messages
props.description: Customizable messages for empty states
